description: Central machine-readable safety contract for SPARTA Strategy Factory v1. EVERY future Strategy Factory component (queue, orchestrator, runner-adapter, dashboard feed) must validate against this contract before any research task may even be CONSIDERED. The contract authorizes nothing: it is research-only, it pins every execution/paper/live/broker/exchange/order/fetch/promotion/Bundle-23 path to false, and it requires explicit human approval for execution, paper/live, and promotion. Fail-closed: a missing file, malformed JSON, a missing key, any forbidden flag set true, or an unknown runner/dataset/mode/market makes the system UNSAFE.
non_authorization_statement: This contract authorizes no paper or live trading, no broker/exchange/order/fetch path, no ACTIVE/STRONG promotion, and no Bundle 23. It executes nothing and mutates no dataset. Crypto-D1 remains WATCH / MIXED and NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA.
